name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Dearborn Heights, MI car title loans from 5 Star Car Title Loans on Drexel St provide same-day funding for vehicle owners.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates a standalone location at 7412 Drexel St in Dearborn Heights, MI. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM (closed Sundays). This Dearborn Heights location serves residents and workers in the area with quick access to car title loan services.

At the Dearborn Heights branch, you can apply for car title loans, which use your vehicle's title as collateral for fast cash. The staff can answer questions about loan terms, required documentation, and application timelines. Call 313-217-3410 during business hours to speak with a loan specialist.

If you're a Dearborn Heights, MI resident facing unexpected expenses, bring your vehicle title, a valid ID, and proof of residency to your appointment. Car title loans can fund within the same day in many cases, making them useful for urgent financial needs. 5 Star provides transparent terms so you know exactly what to expect.
pros: 255,000+ loans funded since 2012 — established operational track record
Borrowers keep their vehicle throughout the loan term
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000 based on vehicle equity
Accepts non-standard vehicles including motorcycles and semi-trucks
Physical locations in ~18 states with online application option
Licensed and regulated lender with stated upfront terms
cons: No APR or interest rate ranges published anywhere on the website — cost is opaque before applying
Vehicle can be repossessed if the borrower defaults
Only 11 public reviews for a company claiming 255K+ loans — very limited independent verification
Available in only ~18 states; not truly nationwide despite 'nationwide' branding
Installment loan terms max at 24 months, limiting flexibility for larger loan amounts
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need same-day emergency cash
Borrowers who need more than a typical payday loan ($2,000–$50,000) and have vehicle equity
Residents of the ~18 supported states who have exhausted lower-cost lending options
Owners of non-standard vehicles (motorcycles, semi-trucks) needing collateral-based financing
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle owners with damaged credit in one of its ~18 supported states who need fast cash from $100 to $50,000 and have no lower-cost alternatives available. The main caveat is that the company does not disclose APR or fee information publicly, and as a title lender, interest costs are typically very high — borrowers risk losing their vehicle if they cannot repay.
services: Car title loans (vehicle as collateral, keep driving)
Installment loans (up to 24 months, fixed payments)
Loans for applicants with bad or no credit
meta_description: Dearborn Heights, MI car title loans at 5 Star on Drexel St. Same-day funding for vehicle owners.
